output.answer: The average lifespan of a Basset Hound is not available in Wikidata. Multiple attempts to retrieve this data using standard properties like P2150 (average lifespan) and P352 (average lifetime) returned no results.
output.formatted:
The average lifespan of a Basset Hound is not available in Wikidata. Multiple attempts to retrieve this data using standard properties like P2150 (average lifespan) and P352 (average lifetime) returned no results.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?lifespan WHERE {
  wd:Q1511 wdt:P2150 ?lifespan .
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 1 columns
